landing.title: Find a church where you want to attend Mass.
landing.subtitle: Cities, churches, Mass times, confession times. Editorially rated for liturgy, sacred music, preaching and parish life. Every entry is released under a four-eyes review.
landing.contributeHeading: Know a church? Become a reviewer.
landing.contributeBody: Reviewers add churches, keep Mass and confession times accurate and rate along the four dimensions. Tier-2 entries are released under a four-eyes check.

cities.title: City Directory
cities.subtitle: Choose a city to open its churches, schedules and editorial notes.

submit.title: Add a Church
submit.subtitle: A new entry in the Ordofinder directory. Published once cleared in the four-eyes review.

city.alsoSubtitle: Below the editorial threshold — listed for completeness.
city.empty: No churches listed yet in this city.

masses.heading: Upcoming Masses
masses.subtitle: The next celebrations in this city, with time, editorial rating and distance from your location. Tap a row for the church profile.
masses.empty: No Mass times on record for the next two weeks.
masses.emptyFiltered: No Masses match these filters. Loosen them to see more.

nearby.heading: Catholic Mass near you — right now
nearby.lead: Share your location. We will show the next Masses at the closest churches, sorted chronologically, with editorial rating and distance.
nearby.denied: Location was denied. You can still browse the city directory.
nearby.unsupported: Your browser does not support location access. Please browse by city.
nearby.leadLocated: The {count} closest churches in the directory.
nearby.upcomingSubtitle: Across all nearby churches, sorted chronologically.

auth.signInLead: Sign in with your reviewer account.
auth.signUpLead: Create an account to apply as a reviewer afterwards.
auth.confirmEmail: Account created. Check your inbox and confirm your email, then sign in.
auth.errorSupabase: Sign-in service not configured. Please try later.
auth.errorOauth: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
auth.errorMissingCode: OAuth code missing. Please try again.
auth.errorInvalidCredentials: Email or password is wrong. No account yet? Create one.
auth.errorNotConfirmed: Please confirm your email, then sign in.
auth.errorAlreadyRegistered: Email already registered. Sign in instead.

apply.heading: Join the catalogue.
apply.lead: Reviewers add churches and rate them along four dimensions: liturgy, sacred music, preaching and parish life. Every application is reviewed by hand. The four-eyes rule keeps the quality up.
apply.pendingBody: Submitted on {date}. We will get back to you by email.
apply.formDisplayNamePlaceholder: How you will appear in the catalogue
apply.formAboutPlaceholder: Short bio: age, occupation, relation to the faith and liturgy, home parish.
apply.formMotivation: Why do you want to review?
apply.formMotivationPlaceholder: What moves you, where you want to contribute, your liturgical background.
apply.formHint: Decided by Tier 0 or Global Admin — typically within a week.
apply.errorAlreadyPending: : you already have a pending application.

reviewer.heading: Moderation queue
reviewer.leadTier1: Open churches, ratings and applications. As a Tier 1+ reviewer, your signatures take effect immediately.
reviewer.leadTier2: Open churches, ratings and applications. As a Tier 2 reviewer, every release needs a second signature.

admin.heading: Stewardship
admin.lead: Moderation queue across the catalogue, applications and role management.

moderation.ownEntry: Your own entry — you cannot sign it.
moderation.alreadySignedByYou: You have already signed this one.

schedule.leadAbove: Add Mass and confession times. Entries save immediately and appear on the public church profile.
schedule.massesLead: Weekday, time, language, rite and form. Use "Usus Antiquior" for the extraordinary form.
schedule.massesEmpty: No Mass times on record yet.
schedule.confessionsLead: Weekday, time (optionally end time), language, note. Mark "by appointment" in the note.
schedule.confessionsEmpty: No confession times on record yet.

submission.sectionIdentitySubtitle: Canonical name, city entry-point and precise coordinates.
submission.sectionFaithSubtitle: Observed rhythm, catechesis, youth presence and communal strength.
submission.sectionFaithDescription: Describe the spiritual energy and parish vitality: liturgical seriousness, youth presence, devotions, confession, adoration and communal life.
submission.sectionArchitectureSubtitle: Diocese, capacity, style and a short archival note.
submission.churchNamePlaceholder: e.g. Basilica of the Holy Trinity
submission.shortNotePlaceholder: Brief editorial note: devotions, youth groups, prayer circles…
submission.descriptionPlaceholder: Historical context, architectural character, schedule confidence, spiritual atmosphere.
submission.successLocal: Validated locally. Connect Supabase to persist the submission.
submission.successRemote: Submitted. We review the entry under the four-eyes rule.
submission.guideline1: Entries are reviewed for historical accuracy, liturgical plausibility and location fidelity.
submission.guideline2: Attach high-resolution facade or interior references once the image workflow is enabled.
submission.guideline3: Cite sources for consecration dates and write editorially, not polemically.
submission.sidebarCaption: Preserving the dignity of sacred spaces.

churchMetrics.heading: Experience
churchMetrics.subtitle: Verified parish data
churchMetrics.liturgyDescription: Reverence, coherence and fidelity in celebration.
churchMetrics.musicDescription: Choir discipline, chant, organ quality and sacred fit.
churchMetrics.homilyDescription: Clarity, structure and doctrinal steadiness in preaching.
churchMetrics.vibrancyDescription: Parish vitality, youth energy and communal life.

schedulePanel.communityDescription: The living pulse of the parish appears in confession, adoration, music, catechesis and the steady companionship of the faithful.
schedulePanel.adorationDescription: A quieter counterweight to the public church: a place for prayer, recollection and faithful continuity of devotion.

mapPage.heading: Catholic geography, clustered
mapPage.description: Explore the archive through city-centred clusters and church markers — editorial density, not tourism clutter.

submitPage.intro: The archive is not kept by editors alone. Every sincere submission deserves careful review.

footer.brandLead: A living index of worthy Catholic celebrations, ordered by city, editorially framed and sustained by careful stewards.

invites.createSubtitle: Issue a scoped archive invitation for a reviewer or steward.
invites.redeemSubtitle: Set your display name and password to activate reviewer access.
invites.redeemSuccess: Account created. You can now sign in from the archive login page.
